title: [FEAT] Add pollinations BYOP and media upload service for `apps/product-packaging-designer`
author: CSE-Anwesha

gist.headline: Bring Your Own Pollen
gist.blurb: The Product Packaging Designer app just got a major upgrade! You can now log in with Pollinations, bring your own Pollen (BYOP), and upload media directly through our native service.
gist.summary: The Product Packaging Designer community app has been updated to support Pollinations SSO, Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) authorization, and native media uploads.
gist.impact: Users can now seamlessly log in with their Pollinations account and use their own Pollen balance to generate packaging designs, with all media uploads handled natively.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 'product packaging designer' app integrating Pollinations SSO and media uploads. Visuals: The bee (Polly) helping design a cute pixel-art box or package, representing the packaging designer app and the new native integration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, happily designing a cardboard box on a retro computer monitor. The screen glows with a lime green (#ecf874) 3D packaging design. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
